name: ytblocker
description: Open-source browser extension that blanks the YouTube and Instagram feeds — Shorts, Reels, Explore, and non-educational videos. Local-first, BYO Claude API key.

scripts.safari:wrap: npm run build && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter .output/chrome-mv3 --project-location safari --app-name ytblocker --bundle-identifier com.dk2lone.ytblocker --macos-only --no-prompt --no-open --force
